channel.title: Hector Ramirez
channel.description: Hector Ramirez's blog — writing about software.

item.title: The SpaceX IPO: a vocabulary lesson
item.description: Market cap, speculating vs. investing, risk tolerance, time horizons — the boring terms that matter, taught by the most exciting stock of the year.

item.title: Claude Fable 5, by the numbers
item.description: Anthropic's new top-tier model — pricing, context window, and how it fits into the lineup.

item.title: Hello, world
item.description: Why I scrapped my portfolio and started a blog.
